poll.question: At the fire, Marcus and Jade sit across the flames—close enough to see, too far to touch. When he looks at her and she looks back, who should move?

options.label: Marcus closes the gap
options.desc: He stopped running. Let him take the next risk.

options.label: Jade reaches across
options.desc: She built this with her hands. Let her reach for more.

options.label: The fire holds them apart
options.desc: Not everything needs crossing tonight. Let this burn as it is.

in_play.label: Trust the promise
in_play.desc: It's strong enough to survive separation—he chose to stay with you, and he will come back.
